title: A button press turns the light on
description: Drive the Toggle's digital input high; the press propagates over the IToggler → IToggleable contract and the Light switches on, counting the switch-on and accumulating on-time on its 1 s timer. Deterministic under `dale dev --stepped`.

steps.label: Press the button (digital input goes high)
Hold it on for 3 s of virtual time

judge.text: TotalTimeOn is about 3 s after the hold (the [Timer(1)] accumulates only while the light is on)
The light's digital output mirrors the On state
